text.title: Software Development Best Practices 2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: CI runs pip install -r requirements.txt with no lockfile; builds drift between runs.
antipattern.root-cause: Author did not switch to uv/poetry.
antipattern.fix: Adopt uv with uv.lock checked into git; pin Python version.

antipattern.symptom: tsconfig.json has strict: false; type errors slip through.
antipattern.fix: Flip to strict + fix the resulting errors in a focused PR.

antipattern.symptom: Every PR triggers 5 lint-fix follow-up commits.
